choices.text: Programs call other programs synchronously. Common: token::transfer, system_program::create_account. CpiContext::new(program, accounts); CPI hops cost ~3k CU; max depth 4.
CpiContext::new_with_signer(program, accounts, &[&seeds[..]]) where seeds include bump. Runtime verifies PDA derivation; only the program that derived the PDA can sign with it. No private key needed.

questions.explanation: new_with_signer + seeds = PDA signing in CPI.
